sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99173" key="sunalwnia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνᾰλωνιάζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἅλων</etym>) <sense id="n99173.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">keep the threshing festival together</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
